items.title: Bilt Rent Day (May 1): Up to a 100% transfer bonus, win a $2,500 styling session in New York City and more
items.summary: Bilt is back with May Rent Day. Enjoy up to a 100% transfer bonus, double points on nonhousing purchases with Bilt cards and much more.

items.title: Bilt Rent Day for May 2026: 40%-100% transfer bonus to Avios programs
items.summary: Bilt Rewards announced details today of its next Rent Day promotion for May 1. You’ll be able to get a bonus of 40%-100% when transferring your Bilt points to Avios programs. The Deal Get a bonus when transferring Bilt Rewards points to British Airways, Iberia, and/or Aer Lingus on May 1, 2026

items.title: Bilt Rent Day Promotion May 2026: Up To 100% Avios Transfer Bonus (BA, IB, EI)
items.summary: Bilt is the platform known for providing rewards for housing payments. Earlier this year we saw massive changes at Bilt, including an overhaul of the credit card portfolio, plus new ways that housing rewards are offered.

items.title: American Express Membership Rewards: How to earn, redeem and transfer points
items.summary: Here's everything to know about earning, spending and maximizing your travel with American Express Membership Rewards points.
